prompt: Create a high-end minimalist fashion editorial photograph in a warm neutral-toned modern apartment. A stylish young East Asian woman with long wavy chestnut-brown hair stands casually leaning against a beige wall beside a large sunlit window. She wears an oversized light beige button-up shirt left open over a fitted black ribbed tank top, high-waisted cream pleated wide-leg trousers, a slim black leather belt with a gold buckle, black leather loafers with gold horsebit details, delicate gold earrings, and layered gold pendant necklaces. A small black leather shoulder bag hangs from her shoulder. The room features soft beige walls, a wooden cabinet with stacked books and a vintage camera, an art poster reading “Art Changes Everything,” a canvas tote bag leaning against the wall, and a framed magazine cover on the floor. Warm golden morning sunlight streams through the window, creating dramatic geometric shadows across the wall, floor, and clothing. Full-body composition, relaxed fashion pose with one hand in pocket, luxury quiet-luxury aesthetic, Scandinavian interior design, neutral color palette, clean styling, natural makeup, soft skin texture, editorial fashion photography, ultra-realistic, premium lifestyle magazine quality, shallow depth of field, cinematic lighting, high detail, 85mm lens, f/2.8, photorealistic, 8K resolution, vertical 4:5 aspect ratio.
